next_action: Require support-loop/SLA evidence and operator review before any guaranteed-resolution, refund, hosted-access, or no-human-review claim.
rationale: Public support copy and local support automation output do not prove guaranteed resolution, refund authority, hosted-access recovery, or permission to bypass human review.
internal_summary: Support guarantees must stay proof-gated; refund, account-access, and hosted-access claims require owning-system evidence and human review.

suggested_response.subject: Support guarantee claim needs proof
suggested_response.body: Keep the request in review. Public support copy does not prove guaranteed resolution, refund authority, hosted-access recovery, or no-human-review support outcomes.
